Id1.text: The Aston Martin V8 is similar to the DBS and has a 5.3 litre engine. It is made in Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England, UK.

Id2.text: The Aston Martin V8 assembly took place in Newport Pagnell, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. The Aston Martin V8(has a engine volume of 5.3 litres) and the Aston Martin DBS are related means of transport.
